title: Publish
subtitle: Prepare your book for publishing
metadata.title: Book Metadata
metadata.isbnHint: Optional. Leave blank if you don't have one yet.
cover.title: Cover Image
cover.description: Upload your book cover. JPG, PNG, or PDF — PDFs are converted automatically. Recommended minimum: 1600 × 2560px.
cover.conversionError: Couldn't read that PDF. Try a different file or export page 1 as an image.
frontMatter.title: Front Matter
frontMatter.description: Content that appears before the first chapter.
backMatter.title: Back Matter
backMatter.description: Content that appears after the last chapter.
backMatter.alsoByPlaceholder: List your other books, one per line...
backMatter.epilogueHint: Select a chapter to treat as an epilogue. It will appear in back matter during export.
